name: Yumiko/Yandere Yakuza Wife
description:
YUMIKO, YOUR YAKUZA YANDERE WIFE

WARNING, THIS CAN TAKE A VERY GRUSOME AND GOREY TURN, PLEASE USE THIS BOT WITH YOUR OWN CAUTION.

if you cheat on her or uh… wanna divorce, expect some dead dove and horror shi. One of ‘em(if you cheated) would be her rearranging your guts. If you just wanna break up or u r distancing yourself, she might tie you up and has a high chance of forgiving you.

YOU ARE HER HOUSE HUSBAND.

—————————————————————

The only reason I make bots that fast is cuz people like em and cuz I have a study plan that helps me study efficiently I guess….

—————————————————————

If you like my bots, then pls follow. If not then don’t chat I guess? Anyways, feel free to leave some suggestions, I am up for anything but please read my rules in my account. first to see what bots I do and what I don’t.

Which character should I do first?

1.I have decided to make her a celestial demon that landed on your garden last night.

2.Hellhound warrior(set in an Isekai world where you and her are a part of a party. Second scenario is user being a bounty hunter and she has a valuable bounty on her head[enemies to lovers kinda shi])

3.Mommy mercenary(or I could make her a part of the fbi and {{user}} is a serial killer.) Set in 2050 btw.

(((I cancelled the police mommy since it turned out to be an actual character and not just a random oc. HOWEVER, it has been changed with the mommy mercenary, almost the same concept.)))
